title: Lead Instructional Designer at Ratna Sagar

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Ratna Sagar
jsonLd.description:
Join the Ratna Sagar family as a Instructional Designer in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Ratna Sagar:
Ratna Sagar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ratna Sagar!
